arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta gives prickly six-word response to being questioned about Bukayo Saka pulling out of England duty after Arsenal winger starred in 3-0 win over Nottingham Forest: 'We can send the MRI scan'
arts.sum: Saka was pivotal in the Gunners' inspiring 3-0 win over Nottingham Forest, scoring once and providing an assist to Thomas Partey for their second goal.

arts.ttl: Arteta 'in love' with Arsenal target, Amorim eyes PSG star for Man Utd, Barcelona stunned: FT Recap
arts.sum: Arteta 'in love' with Arsenal target, Amorim eyes PSG star for Man Utd, Barcelona stunned: FT Recap Man Utd target January midfield transfer despite Amorim 'love' for forgotten star

arts.ttl: Arsenal 3-0 Forest: Mikel Arteta answers Bukayo Saka injury question and explains Ethan Nwaneri plan
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta says that he is building Ethan Nwaneri's first-team exposure "brick by brick" after his first Premier League goal against Nottingham Forest.

arts.ttl: Ethan Nwaneri proves Bukayo Saka and Gabriel Martinelli Arsenal point vs Nottingham Forest
arts.sum: Fabregas, who needs no introduction at the Emirates Stadium and beyond for his achievements as a player, scored his first top-flight goal for the Gunners aged 17 and 113 days. The 17-year-old was on-target for the Gunners in their 3-0 win over Nottingham Forest at the Emirates Stadium as he opened his Premier League account for the club.

arts.ttl: Arsenal reach huge top flight milestone with win over Nottingham Forest
arts.sum: Arsenal are just the second club in the history of top flight English football to record 2,000 wins.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta has unlocked new weapon to help avoid unwanted Arsenal problem
arts.sum: Given extensive injury troubles that have plagued Arteta's ability to select his best XI at times this season, another name out would be a major blow, however Nwaneri's added ability to score in the Premier League will ease these fears. The Gunners sent the Emirates Stadium into pandemonium on Saturday afternoon with such a convincing win against Forest - a much-needed response to the poor stint of the season leading up to the November international break.

arts.ttl: 'Quality players': Nuno Espirito Santo names the three Arsenal players who really 'caused problems' today
arts.sum: Arsenal have returned to winning ways against a Nottingham Forest side whose form has taken a downturn of late. Both the Gunners and the Reds...

arts.ttl: Arsenal next five fixtures compared to Liverpool and Man City after return to top form
arts.sum: Here, football.london has their next five Premier League fixtures analysed and compared to their two most likely title rivals, Manchester City and Liverpool. Well, despite entering the weekend nine points behind Liverpool and already faces questions of their Premier League title credentials, the return of one player has sparked talk of the fight being far from over.

arts.ttl: Wrexham take ex-Arsenal icon's son on trial as Ryan Reynolds move confirmed
arts.sum: According to reports from Mail Online, Yassine Toure, the 18-year-old son of ex-Arsenal, Manchester City and Liverpool defender Kolo, is on trial at Wrexham as he looks to secure his first professional contract. Kolo, meanwhile, is currently a coach at City, where he made 102 appearances over four seasons from 2009 to 2013, winning the Premier League in 2012 and playing alongside his brother Yaya - Yassine's uncle.

arts.ttl: Declan Rice fires Ethan Nwaneri Arsenal message as feelings made clear after first goal
arts.sum: Declan Rice was one of many to pick out the brilliance of Ethan Nwaneri for Arsenal after he scored a first Premier League goal. Rice, who was left out as a precaution, having also pulled out of playing for England over the international break, was not one of those with him on the pitch revelling in the moment.
